sections.label: Context & Background
sections.value: Shipping a faster mobile checkout in Q2. The 2-tap Apple/Google Pay flow is the marquee improvement. Expected to lift mobile conversion from 2.8% to 4.5%.

sections.label: Goals & Objectives
sections.value: Drive awareness within the existing user base. Position as a 'frictionless mobile' story to win back lapsed mobile shoppers. Generate 3+ press mentions in commerce-trade publications.

sections.label: Constraints & Considerations
sections.value: No external launch event budget. Sales team is not involved (B2C SMB). Lifecycle email is the primary channel. Cannot mention specific abandonment metrics in public-facing copy (competitive sensitivity).
